name: edtime — Login Assist
description: Assist login edtime: buka app, isi username dari Keychain Passwords (iOS 18+), user tap login + Face ID
limitations: iOS tidak izinkan auto-submit password tanpa interaksi user
Setelah login sukses, edtime menyimpan session — fetch berikutnya tidak perlu login

steps.note: iOS 18+ Passwords action — cari entri edtime / eurodata / employer URL

then: Show Notification: Paste username di field login edtime
Show Notification: Paste password lalu tap Anmelden/Login
else: Show Alert: Simpan password edtime di Settings → Passwords dulu
Open URL https://www.edtime.de/ in Safari as fallback

first_time_setup: Login edtime manual sekali di app
Atau: Settings → Passwords → Add — website edtime.de + kredensial employer
Centang 'Remember me' di app jika tersedia
